name: Tigertown Sports
about: Tigertown Sports is a multi-sport entertainment venue featuring an 18-hole miniature golf course, 3 sand volleyball courts, and a high-definition sports simulator. The facility includes a full-service bar with hand-crafted cocktails, an indoor/outdoor patio with TVs, and a pizza and snack station. They offer private party hosting and leagues, with a focus on providing a casual, social environment that combines sports with dining and drinking. The venue caters to a wide range of activities from casual play to competitive matches and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of activities including golf, volleyball, and yard games
Full-service bar and food options available on-site
Social atmosphere perfect for groups and casual play
High-definition simulator available for virtual sports
Private party and event hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Wings and Hunt Brothers pizza available, plus a snack bar with candy, chips, sodas, and flavored drinks
Full-service bar offering hand-crafted cocktails and other alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art virtual golf simulator with swing suite technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs for the simulator?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use your own golf clubs in the virtual golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers wings, pizza, snacks, and a full-service bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes of miniature golf?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a time, but it's an 18-hole course designed to be a classic miniature golf experience.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with miniature golf, beach volleyball, and a casual atmosphere that welcomes children.
